debug_info.goal:
a b : Nat
⊢ a + b = b + a

failed_attempts:
rw [add_comm a b]
  -- The result follows directly from the commutativity of addition.
  exact h

rw [add_comm]
  -- Apply the general proof to the specific case of `a` and `b`
  exact h a b

| zero => simp
    | succ a ih =>
      induction b with
      | zero => simp [ih]
      | succ b ih' =>
        simp_all [add_assoc]
        <;>
        simp_all [add_assoc]
        <;>
        simp_all [add_assoc]
  exact h a b

ring
  -- Use the result from the `have` statement to conclude the proof.
  exact h₁

sorry
  <;> simp_all [add_comm]
  <;> try contradiction
  <;> try norm_num
  <;> try linarith
  <;> try ring
  <;> try omega

rw [add_comm a b]
  -- The result follows directly from the symmetric property of addition
  exact h

| zero => simp
  | succ a ih =>
    cases b with
    | zero => simp [Nat.add_assoc]
    | succ b =>
      simp_all [Nat.add_assoc]
      <;>
      simp_all [Nat.add_assoc]
      <;>
      simp_all [Nat.add_assoc]
